message:
feat(mattermost): add resource types, auth caps, and harden configuration validation

Expand the Mattermost connector with richer introspection metadata and
stricter configuration validation:

**Resource Types & Auth Caps:**
- Define five resource types with JSON schemas and URI patterns:
  mattermost.user, mattermost.team, mattermost.channel, mattermost.post,
  mattermost.file — enabling clients to understand the data model.
- Declare auth_caps listing personal_access_token, bot_access_token,
  and credential_id methods so orchestrators can present the right auth
  flow. Previously auth_caps was None.

**Configuration Hardening:**
- Reject ambiguous auth when both token and credential_id are provided
  (previously silently preferred token).
- Reject blank/whitespace-only base_url with a descriptive error
  mentioning Mattermost's self-hosted deployment model.
- Trim whitespace from base_url, token, and credential_id before use.
- Reject request_timeout_ms of zero.

**AI Hint Improvements:**
- Add common_mistakes entries for team visibility with bot tokens,
  private/DM channel membership, server-wide vs team-scoped search,
  bot channel membership for uploads and posts, and workspace-admin
  API scope boundaries.
- Update manifest description to clarify first-slice scope.
- Expand types.rs doc comments to explain bot vs personal token usage.

**Tests:**
- introspection_exposes_self_hosted_scope_resources: verify all 5
  resource types are present.
- operations_do_not_expose_workspace_admin_capability: guard against
  scope creep into admin APIs.
- configure_rejects_ambiguous_auth_modes: verify dual-auth error.
- configure_rejects_blank_base_url: verify empty URL error.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -11,7 +11,7 @@ interface_hash = "blake3-256:fcp.interface.v2:83032732650d5dd374f8edfd3c299ec224
 id = "fcp.mattermost"
 name = "Mattermost Connector"
 version = "0.1.0"
-description = "Self-hosted collaboration connector for Mattermost messaging"
+description = "Self-hosted collaboration connector for Mattermost team/channel/post/file workflows; first slice excludes System Console, SCIM/LDAP, plugin, and workspace-admin APIs"
 archetypes = ["operational", "bidirectional"]
 format = "native"

@@ -9,10 +9,14 @@ use serde_json::Value;
 pub struct MattermostConfig {
     /// Base URL of the Mattermost server (e.g., `https://mattermost.example.com`).
     pub base_url: String,
-    /// Personal access token or bot token.
+    /// Personal access token or bot access token.
+    ///
+    /// Bot accounts are preferred for durable integrations, but self-hosted
+    /// deployments often start with personal access tokens when bot creation
+    /// is not enabled yet.
     #[serde(default)]
     pub token: Option<String>,
-    /// Credential ID for egress-proxy injection.
+    /// Credential ID for egress-proxy injection of a personal or bot token.
     #[serde(default)]
     pub credential_id: Option<String>,
     /// Request timeout in milliseconds.
